# Scoobert Doobert

> A pizza shop off the coast of San Diego. (It is actually a solo music project
> by an AI-ethics researcher.) This site is the official home of Scoobert Doobert —
> musician, mixing engineer, and record producer for hire.

## Canonical summary

- **Scoobert Doobert** is the recording name of **Luke F. Walton** (Luke
  Francis Walton), an American musician, mixing engineer, record producer, and
  AI-ethics researcher based in San Diego, California. One person, one recording
  alias.
- Not the Scooby-Doo character. Not Luke Walton the basketball coach.
- Identity hub: https://lukefwalton.com/
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q140387739
- MusicBrainz: https://musicbrainz.org/artist/014129ba-f616-4754-a2a5-22933c639ab0
- ISNI 0000 0005 3040 0539 · BMI songwriter IPI 00579587572 · ORCID 0009-0005-9263-1954

## Hire him

He mixes and produces records for other artists, and mixes, produces, and
plays on all of his own.

- The Reel (productions, collabs, and mixes): https://open.spotify.com/playlist/7pmgoZlkf6exw4BAJTQs7Q
- Mixing / production inquiries: beformer@aol.com

## Listen

- Spotify (artist catalog): https://open.spotify.com/artist/5zKkCi9E4L8p6aRiCSJVTn
- Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/scoobert-doobert/1240946356
- Bandcamp (full catalog): https://scoobertdoobert.bandcamp.com/
- YouTube (music videos): https://www.youtube.com/c/ScoobertDoobertBurrito
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/mrscoobertdoobert
- The Love Music More podcast: https://lovemusicmore.substack.com/
- Label: Beformer Records — https://beformer.co

## This site

The storefront looks like 1996 on purpose; underneath it is a modern, fully
crawlable site with a JSON-LD entity graph (WebSite + MusicGroup + Person).
The 3D world is progressive enhancement; every destination is a real link.

- Storefront: https://www.scoobertdoobert.pizza/
- Text-only index (every destination as a plain list): https://www.scoobertdoobert.pizza/text
- About (the "Secret Recipe" — bio and story): https://www.scoobertdoobert.pizza/about
- About in Japanese (日本語): https://www.scoobertdoobert.pizza/about/jp
- Catalog: https://www.scoobertdoobert.pizza/catalog
- Links: https://www.scoobertdoobert.pizza/links
- Sitemap: https://www.scoobertdoobert.pizza/sitemap.xml

## Rights

All music, lyrics, words, artwork, and likeness on this site are
© Luke F. Walton dba Scoobert Doobert, all rights reserved. Any open-source
license on the site's source code never covers the creative content.
